title: Stage 3 Delta_rz Fails 10-Seed Validation

content.hypothesis: Delta_rz eta adaptation (Session 6 Exp B) provides robust improvement over fixed eta when tested across 10 seeds
content.result: FAIL. Training: p=0.999 (d=-0.001), Novel: p=0.688 (d=0.19). Adaptive and fixed eta are statistically identical.
implications: Session 6 Experiment B +55% generalization was seed-specific noise (3 seeds insufficient)
System is INSENSITIVE to per-cell eta variation — adaptive eta produces healthy distributions but no performance gain
Stage 3 for eta is a dead end: the scaling parameter sits on a flat landscape
The binding constraints may be STRUCTURAL (equation form, topology, beta/gamma), not scaling parameters
Frozen frame reduction via eta adaptation is technically possible but functionally meaningless
content.key_insight: Making eta adaptive is solving a non-problem. The system's performance is not limited by learning rate heterogeneity. The real frozen frame constraints are structural.

constraints_implied: Per-cell eta adaptation does not improve performance — the system is insensitive to learning rate heterogeneity
